---
title: "Who Will Win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?"
subtitle: "A Data-Driven Prediction"
author: "Mohamad Boroumand"
date: "April 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: false
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.04
    center: false
    controls: true
    progress: true
    css: styles.css
---

## {.slide1 background-color="#0d1b2a"}

::: {.title-block}
::: badge
⚽ 2026 FIFA WORLD CUP · USA / CAN / MEX
:::

# Who Will Win?

# [Spain 🇪🇸]{style="color: #4fc3f7;"}

[A data-driven prediction — by Mohamad Boroumand]{style="color: #aabbcc; font-size: 0.68em;"}
:::

::: stat-grid
::: stat-card
[48]{.num}
[Teams competing<br/>(expanded from 32)]{.lbl}
:::

::: stat-card
[104]{.num}
[Matches across<br/>3 host nations]{.lbl}
:::

::: stat-card
[4]{.num}
[Consecutive years<br/>Spain topped UEFA]{.lbl}
:::
:::

::: quarto-badge
📄 Created with Quarto · format: revealjs · embed-resources: true
:::

---

## Why Spain? The Evidence

**Win probability — top contenders**

::: h-bar-row
[🇪🇸 Spain]{.h-bar-label}
::: h-bar-track
::: {.h-bar-fill style="width:82%; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#f0c040,#e08020);"}
~19%
:::
:::
:::

::: h-bar-row
[🇫🇷 France]{.h-bar-label}
::: h-bar-track
::: {.h-bar-fill style="width:68%; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#4fc3f7,#1565c0);"}
~16%
:::
:::
:::

::: h-bar-row
[🇧🇷 Brazil]{.h-bar-label}
::: h-bar-track
::: {.h-bar-fill style="width:58%; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#69f0ae,#2e7d32);"}
~14%
:::
:::
:::

::: h-bar-row
[🇩🇪 Germany]{.h-bar-label}
::: h-bar-track
::: {.h-bar-fill style="width:42%; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#9e9e9e,#424242);"}
~10%
:::
:::
:::

[Estimated outright win probability (Opta / FiveThirtyEight–style model, April 2026)]{style="font-size:0.38em; color:#667;"}

::: reasons
::: reason-box
**🧠 Tactical Brilliance**

De la Fuente's press-and-possess system produced the highest pass-completion rate at Euro 2024 (88.3%) while winning every single match.
:::

::: reason-box
**🌟 Peak-Age Squad**

Yamal (18), Pedri (23), Gavi (22) — Spain's core hits its prime exactly at the 2026 tournament.
:::

::: reason-box
**📊 Tournament Record**

Spain has won 3 of the last 4 major tournaments (WC 2010, Euro 2012, Euro 2024). No other nation matches this recent consistency.
:::

::: reason-box
**🌎 Host Advantage ≈ 0**

With 3 host nations, crowd advantage is split. Spain's neutral-venue win rate (73%) is the best among contenders.
:::
:::

---

## Prediction & Counter-Arguments

::: podium
::: {.podium-bar .p2}
[🇫🇷]{.flag}
[France]{.ctry}
[Runner-up]{.prob}
:::

::: {.podium-bar .p1}
[🇪🇸]{.flag}
[SPAIN]{.ctry}
[🏆 Champion]{.prob}
:::

::: {.podium-bar .p3}
[🇧🇷]{.flag}
[Brazil]{.ctry}
[3rd Place]{.prob}
:::

::: {.podium-bar .pn}
[🇩🇪]{.flag}
[Germany]{.ctry}
[Semi]{.prob}
:::
:::

### ⚠️ Risks to This Prediction

::: risk-row
::: risk-item
**Injury Risk**

Pedri & Gavi have chronic fitness issues. Losing either would significantly weaken Spain's midfield engine.
:::

::: risk-item
**France's Depth**

Mbappé + Dembélé + Camavinga — France may have the highest talent ceiling of any team in the tournament.
:::

::: risk-item
**48-Team Format**

More matches = more fatigue & upset risk. Spain's style is demanding; rotation depth will be tested.
:::
:::

[*Forecast based on UEFA rankings, Opta xG data, squad age profiles, and tournament history · April 2026*]{style="font-size:0.45em; color:#778;"}
